city: Ali Al Salem Air Base, Kuwait
notes: Deadliest attack on US forces. Fattah missiles penetrated Patriot coverage. First US combat deaths of conflict.
CENTCOM forward HQ. THAAD and Patriot intercepted majority of incoming.
Joint US-UAE base. Attack included Houthi-launched drones from Yemen.
US Fifth Fleet headquarters. Naval Support Activity Bahrain.
US consulate area and Kurdish Peshmerga positions targeted.
Repeat target from 2020 Iranian retaliation. US forces dispersed after lessons learned.

Hezbollah and direct Iranian missile strikes on northern Israel. Day 13: Rocket fire from Lebanon continues as IDF ground operation begins. Day 14: 300+ Hezbollah rockets hit northern Israel in retaliation for IDF advance to Bint Jbeil.

casualties_reported: Iron Dome / Arrow intercepted most; debris casualties
notes: Largest missile barrage on Tel Aviv since October 2023 escalation. Day 13: Hezbollah retaliatory strikes intensify as IDF crosses into southern Lebanon. Day 14: Continued Hezbollah rocket fire; some reaching further south than previous days.

casualties_reported: Runway damage, aircraft losses not confirmed
notes: Home of Israeli F-35I Adir squadron. Priority target for Iran.
Symbolic targeting near Israeli nuclear facility. Arrow-3 exoatmospheric intercepts.

weapon: Israeli airstrikes (in response to Hezbollah entry)
notes: Hezbollah entered war March 2. Israel responded with massive strikes on Dahieh and southern Lebanon. Day 13: IDF launches ground incursion — first since 2006. Day 14: IDF advances 5km to Bint Jbeil. Heavy fighting. 6 more IDF soldiers killed (10 total in ground op). 65 Lebanese killed on Day 14.

Southern Lebanese city. Hezbollah rocket launch sites targeted. Israel ordered all residents south of Litani to move north on Day 6. Day 14: IDF ground forces engage Hezbollah near Bint Jbeil; IEDs and tunnel warfare reported.
World's largest oil loading facility. Houthi attacks on Saudi infrastructure to widen conflict.

casualties_reported: Ship damage — no crew casualties reported
notes: Three vessels struck on Day 12. Day 13: IRGC fires anti-ship missiles at US convoy escort vessels; USS Paul Ignatius intercepts both. Day 14: IRGC fast boats approach second convoy but withdraw after warning shots. US retaliatory strikes destroy 5 IRGC coastal battery positions overnight.

casualties_reported: 1 US service member died from injuries (8th US KIA total)
notes: US service member who sustained injuries in March 1 attack succumbed to wounds on March 11. Eighth US combat death of the conflict.
